title: Add MacAddress to inspect
body: Use interfaces from cnitypes and use it to find the MacAddress of the container.

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`

You'll also need to clear the new Interfaces field in State at https://github.com/42wim/libpod/blob/467ef9fb6d5bcd82adf3287b47645798d7b7c722/libpod/container_internal.go#L808 and https://github.com/42wim/libpod/blob/467ef9fb6d5bcd82adf3287b47645798d7b7c722/libpod/boltdb_state.go#L182
@42wim Also, your commit is missing a signoff - please add one with `git commit -s --amend` and repush
LGTM and happy green test buttons.
